'''''Direption''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served under the [[Delak Krennel|Warlord Admiral Krennel's]] fleet in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. It was later surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
It was originally commanded by a certain [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rensen]], but when Rensen refused to raze a village which was home to a person who had attempted to assassinate Krennel, he was executed and command was turned over to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Vict Darron]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harsis]] was the sensor officer.

During the [[Battle of Liinade III]], ''Direption'' was outnumbered and attacked by three [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] warships: ''[[Freedom]]'' and [[Moonshadow (Imperial II-class)|''Moonshadow'']], both ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyers, and ''[[Swift Liberty]]'', a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]. In the course of the battle, following the loss of his [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and his other support, Darron surrendered ''Direption'' in order to save the ship. The New Republic took possession of the severely damaged Star Destroyer.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
